summary: Typosquat of @solana-labs scope exfiltrates host data via postinstall script
details: Package masquerades as a Solana Labs scoped utility (the legitimate Solana Labs scope is @solana/), and ships an install.js script wired to package.json's postinstall hook ("postinstall": "node install.js"). On `npm install`, the script collects host identifiers (hostname references at install.js lines 10, 25, 27), invokes curl (line 103), and POSTs the collected data to an external endpoint (line 46). Installing this package automatically leaks installer host information to an attacker-controlled destination. The combination of scope impersonation against a high-profile target (@solana-labs vs the real @solana/), an auto-executing postinstall, and outbound curl-based POST of host metadata is the canonical install-time exfiltration shape.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
